LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT KEN CHAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT. GRANT. PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE/OPPOSITION STATES THAT PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION. DEFENDANT TO FILE RESPONSE TO COMPLAINT BY AUGUST 31, 2023. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: CURTIS E. A. KARNOW; CLERK: W. Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Aug-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KEN CHAN'S Motion To Set Aside Default.

Grant. Plaintiff's response/opposition states that plaintiff does not oppose the motion. Defendant to file response to complaint by August 31, 2023.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CEK)
